data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet on a solid flat #FF00FF magenta chroma-key background only. Exact layout: 2 rows by 2 columns, exactly 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. No visible borders, no grid lines, no text, no labels, no numbers, no UI, no watermark.

Subject: normal-style elite thunder demon general for Samsara Ascension; imposing armored xianxia demon boss sprite. Dark bronze armor, horned helm silhouette, tight crackling purple-blue thunder accents integrated close to the body, heavy polearm held close. Clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG boss sprite, readable at small size, not cute, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

Action: walk cycle with real body pose changes across the 4 frames, not just scaling, camera movement, glow changes, or sliding. Frame 1 top-left: first stride, leading side moves forward, body leans in travel direction. Frame 2 top-right: passing step, body rises, rear side catches up, cloth/petals trail backward. Frame 3 bottom-left: opposite stride, other side moves forward, weight clearly shifts. Frame 4 bottom-right: passing step returning toward neutral, body lowers slightly; loop clearly reads as movement.

View/framing: full body visible, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, stable bottom/feet anchor line when grounded, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame. Subject fills about 55% to 62% of each cell with generous magenta margin. Preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes/core face, costume/armor marks, weapon/focus, and material language in every cell; only pose, compact cloth motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and small attached aura may change.

Containment: entire subject and any weapon, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, talisman, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell; nothing crosses a cell edge; no detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud.

Style: crisp, clean, readable hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite sheet, consistent lighting, sharp silhouette, high detail but compact, boss-grade but legible.
